history.title: Learning Lenape
history.description: "The native people of the Skylands region had no written history. In fact, they had no writing except for the use of pictographs, some of which were carved on stone. Much of what we do know about New Jersey's prehistory is a result of work done by archaeologists working with other scholars to recons
